revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox ancient site | name = Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) | image = [[File:Sasazuka_Kofun_in_Katsumoto,_Iki,_Nagasaki.jpg|280px]] | caption = Kofun and Stone Chamber Entrance | part_of = {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft}} | location = {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure 936, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft}} | coordinates = 33 | Lat_minutes = 48 | Lat_seconds = 10.25 | coordinates = 129 | Long_minutes = 42 | Long_seconds = 14.75 | omitted = JP-42 | type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} | area = Approximately 66 m in diameter | burial = Both-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}
(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft}} inside) | Excavated Items = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefecture's Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == Excavated Items == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft}} under the name "Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft}}. Designated on ... ...818 bytes (84 words) - 06:25, 19 January 2025 * [[Iki Kofun Group]] | location = {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture ...}}) is a collection of six Kofuns located in {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. The group is Historic site as a National {{ill|Histori ...4 KB (487 words) - 06:01, 19 January 2025 * [[Sasazuka Kofun]] {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')}} '''Sasazuka Kofun'''('''笹塚古墳''') is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}}located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... == 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 == * {{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|lt=Sasazuka Kofun|lt_2=(Iki City)Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox ancient site | name = Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) | image = [[File:Sasazuka_Kofun_in_Katsumoto,_Iki,_Nagasaki.jpg|280px]] | caption = Kofun and Stone Chamber Entrance | part_of = {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} | location = {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure 936, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}} | coordinates = 33 | Lat_minutes = 48 | Lat_seconds = 10.25 | coordinates = 129 | Long_minutes = 42 | Long_seconds = 14.75 | omitted = JP-42 | type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} | area = Approximately 66 m in diameter | burial = Both-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}
(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} inside) | Excavated Items = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefecture's Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == Excavated Items == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 Excavated Items from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}. Designated on ... ...818 bytes (84 words) - 06:25, 19 January 2025 * [[Iki Kofun Group]] | location = {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture ...}}) is a collection of six Kofuns located in {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. The group is Historic site as a National {{ill|Histori ...4 KB (487 words) - 06:01, 19 January 2025 * [[Sasazuka Kofun]] {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')}} '''Sasazuka Kofun'''('''笹塚古墳''') is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}}located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... == 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 == * {{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|lt=Sasazuka Kofun|lt_2=(Iki City)Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox ancient site | name = Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) | image = [[File:Sasazuka_Kofun_in_Katsumoto,_Iki,_Nagasaki.jpg|280px]] | caption = Kofun and Stone Chamber Entrance | part_of = {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} | location = {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure 936, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}} | coordinates = 33 | Lat_minutes = 48 | Lat_seconds = 10.25 | coordinates = 129 | Long_minutes = 42 | Long_seconds = 14.75 | omitted = JP-42 | type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} | area = Approximately 66 m in diameter | burial = Both-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}
(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} inside) | burial goods = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefecture's Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial goods == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}. Designated on ... ...818 bytes (84 words) - 06:25, 19 January 2025 * [[Iki Kofun Group]] | location = {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture ...}}) is a collection of six Kofuns located in {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. The group is Historic site as a National {{ill|Histori ...4 KB (487 words) - 06:01, 19 January 2025 * [[Sasazuka Kofun]] {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')}} '''Sasazuka Kofun'''('''笹塚古墳''') is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}}located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... == 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 == * {{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|lt=Sasazuka Kofun|lt_2=(Iki City)Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. {{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox ancient site | name = Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) | image = [[File:Sasazuka_Kofun_in_Katsumoto,_Iki,_Nagasaki.jpg|280px]] | caption = Kofun and Stone Chamber Entrance | part_of = {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} | location = {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure 936, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}} | coordinates = 33 | Lat_minutes = 48 | Lat_seconds = 10.25 | coordinates = 129 | Long_minutes = 42 | Long_seconds = 14.75 | omitted = JP-42 | type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} | area = Approximately 66 m in diameter | burial = Both-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}
(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} inside) | burial goods = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefecture's Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial goods == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}. The group is Historic site as a National {{ill|Histori ...4 KB (487 words) - 06:01, 19 January 2025 * [[Sasazuka Kofun]] {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')}} '''Sasazuka Kofun'''('''笹塚古墳''') is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}}located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... == 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 == * {{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|lt=Sasazuka Kofun|lt_2=(Iki City)Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial goods == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}. Designated on ... ...818 bytes (84 words) - 06:25, 19 January 2025 * [[Iki Kofun Group]] | location = {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture ...}}) is a collection of six Kofuns located in {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. The group is Historic site as a National {{ill|Histori ...4 KB (487 words) - 06:01, 19 January 2025 * [[Sasazuka Kofun]] {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')}} '''Sasazuka Kofun'''('''笹塚古墳''') is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}}located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... == 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 == * {{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|lt=Sasazuka Kofun|lt_2=(Iki City)Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox ancient site | name = Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) | image = [[File:Sasazuka_Kofun_in_Katsumoto,_Iki,_Nagasaki.jpg|280px]] | caption = Kofun and Stone Chamber Entrance | part_of = {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} | location = {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure 936, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}} | coordinates = 33 | Lat_minutes = 48 | Lat_seconds = 10.25 | coordinates = 129 | Long_minutes = 42 | Long_seconds = 14.75 | omitted = JP-42 | type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} | area = Approximately 66 m in diameter | burial = Both-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}
(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} inside) | burial goods = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefecture's Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial goods == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}. Designated on ... ...818 bytes (84 words) - 06:25, 19 January 2025 * [[Iki Kofun Group]] | location = {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture ...}}) is a collection of six Kofuns located in {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|'''壱岐市'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. The group is Historic site as a National {{ill|Histori ...4 KB (487 words) - 06:01, 19 January 2025 * [[Sasazuka Kofun]] {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')}} '''Sasazuka Kofun'''('''笹塚古墳''') is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}}located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... == 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 == * {{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|lt=Sasazuka Kofun|lt_2=(Iki City)Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} inside) | burial goods = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefecture's Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Bird's-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial goods == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|'''笹塚古墳''' ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|'''掛木古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 ('''壱岐市''')|12=draft|12=draft}}. east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|'''兵瀬古墳'''|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Otheruses||Kofun in Iki City, Nagasaki Prefecture|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)}} '''Sasazuka Kofun''' (笹塚古墳) is a {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in Higashiya-machi, {{i ... 6 KB (816 words) - 03:41, 18 January 2025 {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Iki Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Iki City]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic sites of Japan in Nagasaki Prefecture]] [[Category:円墳]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property (Japan)]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:%E7%AC%B9%E5%A1%9A%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3 (%E5%A3%B1%E5%B2%90%E5%B8%82)]] [[en:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] [[sn:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)}}

But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox ancient site | name = Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) | image = [[File:Sasazuka_Kofun_in_Katsumoto,_Iki,_Nagasaki.jpg|280px]] | caption = Kofun and Stone Chamber Entrance | part_of = {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}} | location = {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure 936, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}} | coordinates = 33 | Lat_minutes = 48 | Lat_seconds = 10.25 | coordinates = 129 | Long_minutes = 42 | Long_seconds = 14.75 | omitted = JP-42 | type = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} | area = Approximately 66 m in diameter | burial = Both-sleeved {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}
(with composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} inside) | burial goods = Gilded turtle-shaped decorative fittings, silver items, gilded items, and many other burial goods | Associated Mounds = | built = Late 6th century to the end of the 6th century | Interred_individual = | Historic site = Included in the nationally Historic site {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} "Iki Kofun Group" | Tangible designation1 = excavations (national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}) | notes = | map = Japan Nagasaki | type = Round Kofun | map_dot_label = Sasazuka Kofun | map_dot_label = bottom }} Sasazuka Kofun (笹塚古墳) is an {{ill|ancient Kofun (kofun)|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iki City|ja|壱岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Katsumoto Town, Yurihatafure, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|ja|長崎県|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is a {{ill|round kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} and one of the Kofuns that type part of the {{ill|Iki Kofun Group|ja|壱岐古墳群|12=draft|12=draft}}, Historic site as a national {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}}. The burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Overview == This kofun was built on a hill in the central part of Iki Island. Surveys of the Kofun and stone chamber were conducted by the Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education in 1989 (Heisei 1) and by the typeer Katsumoto Town Board of Education in 1990 (Heisei 2), with further investigations carried out between 2002 and 2003 (Heisei 14–15){{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/jiten/index.php/view/238 Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefectural Board of Education, "Encyclopedia of Nagasaki Prefectures Ruins").. The mound is circular, constructed in two tiers, with a diameter of approximately 66 meters. It is estimated to have been built in the late 6th century, with additional burials continuing until around the late 7th century{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial == [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-B.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Birds-eye View}}]] [[File:Sasazuka Kofun (Iki), 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Stone Chamber Expanded View}}]] The burial facility is a multi-chambered {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, consisting of a main chamber, middle chamber, antechamber, and a passage, opening to the southwest{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. The stone chamber was already open during the Edo period, and records in the "{{ill|Iki Fudoki|ja|壱岐国風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}" mention inscriptions within the chamber, though these inscriptions were lost by the early Shōwa period{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. area of the stone chamber are as follows{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}: * Total length: 14.8 m{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}} (15.2 m) * Main chamber: Length 3.8 m, Width 2.7 m, Height 3.5 m * Middle chamber: Length 4.5 m, Width 2 m, Height 1.8 m * Antechamber: Length 4.2 m, Width 1.8 m, Height 1.8 m * Passage: Length 2.3 m A composite {{ill|box-shaped stone coffin|ja|箱式石棺|12=draft|12=draft}} made of tuff is placed at the innermost part of the main chamber, measuring 2 m long, 1 m wide, and 0.7 m deep{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. It is said that another stone coffin once existed in front of it, though no trace of it has been found{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. == burial goods == Despite being looted in ancient times, notable burial goods have been discovered, including a unique turtle-shaped decorative fitting—the only one of its kind found in Japan—as well as gilded horse trappings, iron aprons, and other items reflecting advanced craftsmanship{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. Additional items include Sue pottery, Haji pottery bowls, Korean Peninsula-style ceramic vessels, iron burial goods, glass beads, gold rings, and spoon-shaped bronze items{{Sfn|Sasazuka Kofun (Zoku Kofun)|2002}}. These burial goods are Historic site as national {{ill|Important designation1|ja|重要文化財|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)|2=ja|3=重要文化財|lt=Important Cultural Property|qq= (Japan)|4=ko|5=일본의_중요문화재|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name "burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture". == Historic site == === Important designation1 (National designation1) === * burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture (Archaeological Materials) – Designated on June 8, 2007 (Heisei 19){{National designation1 Database|201|00011271|burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun, Nagasaki Prefecture}}[http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/482 burial goods from Sasazuka Kofun] (Nagasaki Prefecture Website).. ** 1 Gilded Turtle-shaped Decorative Fitting ** 1 Silver Item ** 39 Gilded Items ** 4 Bronze Items ** 52 Iron Items ** 46 Glass Items ** 19 Earthenware Items == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Iki City Ikikoku Museum|ja|壱岐市立一支国博物館|12=draft|12=draft}} (Ashibe Town, Fukaetsurugamefure, Iki City) – Houses burial goods excavated from Sasazuka Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki)}} * [http://www.pref.nagasaki.jp/bunkadb/index.php/view/645 Iki Kofun Group] - Nagasaki Prefecture Website "Historic site of Nagasaki Prefecture" of Nagasaki Prefecture]] * [[Hyoze Kofun]] ...nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iw ...ers; east-west: 18 meters). ...City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|兵瀬古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...eter: 54 meters). ...墳}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Sasazuka Kofun (Iki City)|ja|笹塚古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>, {{ill|Hyoze Kofun|ja|兵瀬古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, <nowiki>{{ill|Kakegi Kofun|...2 KB (196 words) - 06:26, 19 January 2025 * [[Kakegi Kofun]] ...ja|掛木古墳|12=draft|12=draft}}, and <nowiki>{{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}}</nowiki>. Designated on ... ...|Kakegi Kofun|ja|掛木古墳}}, and {{ill|Oni-no-Iwaya Kofun (Iki City)|ja|鬼の窟古墳 (壱岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}}.
